name: Continental Lemon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan with a wire whisk, beat all the ingredients together until smooth.
2. Cook over medium-low heat while stirring constantly until thickened (do not boil).
3. Serve over vegetables, seafood, poached eggs, or use as an alternative to Hollandaise sauce.
Makes 1 2/3 cups.
